completed: Refactored emailService to be generic and support plug-and-play failover

decisions.context: User reminded about existing multi-account email infrastructure.
decisions.decision: Refactored emailService to extract core logic into sendMail and used it for both credentials and feedback, removing the separate Resend implementation.
decisions.trade_offs: Sacrificed the standalone Resend request in favor of architectural consistency with the existing 'plug and play' system.
